map_caption: Current model-predicted environmental suitability for probable acute/subacute paracoccidioidomycosis in Brazil. Values represent model-predicted annualized suitability rates per 100,000 inhabitants using the M3 climate-soil-elevation negative binomial model trained on 1998-2024 municipality-year data. The map should be interpreted as relative suitability, not observed incidence.

Quantile-based classes of current model-predicted suitability for probable acute/subacute paracoccidioidomycosis. Classes summarize the distribution of current predicted suitability across Brazilian municipalities.

Municipality-level categories of future suitability change under SSP245 | 2041-2060. Categories are based on percent change relative to the current model-predicted baseline and should be interpreted as modeled suitability change, not confirmed future incidence.

Municipality-level categories of future suitability change under SSP245 | 2061-2080. Categories are based on percent change relative to the current model-predicted baseline and should be interpreted as modeled suitability change, not confirmed future incidence.

Municipality-level categories of future suitability change under SSP585 | 2041-2060. Categories are based on percent change relative to the current model-predicted baseline and should be interpreted as modeled suitability change, not confirmed future incidence.

Municipality-level categories of future suitability change under SSP585 | 2061-2080. Categories are based on percent change relative to the current model-predicted baseline and should be interpreted as modeled suitability change, not confirmed future incidence.

Absolute future-minus-current change in model-predicted suitability for probable acute/subacute paracoccidioidomycosis under SSP245 | 2041-2060. Positive values indicate higher future suitability compared with the current baseline. Values are differences in model-predicted annualized suitability rates per 100,000 inhabitants.

Future model-predicted suitability for probable acute/subacute paracoccidioidomycosis under SSP245 | 2041-2060. Current BIOCLIM predictors were replaced with CMIP6 ensemble future predictors, while soil and elevation were held constant. Values are model-predicted annualized suitability rates per 100,000 inhabitants, not observed incidence.
